arts.ttl: Euro club seal transfer agreement amid Leeds United January interest
arts.sum: Rennes had been reported to be interested in signing Illan Meslier from Leeds United this January, but they have instead agreed to sign another Championship promotion-winner in Brice Samba. It leaves them needing a long-term solution, to which Meslier was named as one of their potential options, amid links from the Sun claiming Manchester United are considering a move too.

arts.ttl: Gabriel Agbonlahor makes exciting Leeds United prediction and aims dig at Derby County
arts.sum: Derby very good at home, poor away. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

Derby dealt West Brom fans another brutal blow on Boxing Day in a 2-1 victory, compounding the Baggies' misery after Carlos Corberan's departure. The Rams have won two of their last three league gam...

arts.ttl: New Leeds United fitness update, two late fitness tests imminent
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Derby County tomorrow in their final game of 2024, looking to remain top of the pile after victory on Boxing Day. A huge boost for Leeds in December was the return of Ethan Ampadu well ahead of schedule, starting the last two games – once in centre-back and once in midfield.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne explains why Derby County fancy their chances of toppling leaders Leeds United
arts.sum: Every game we come into with this group, whoever it is, we fancy our chances and the same is true for Leeds." Head coach Paul Warne is confident his Derby County side will give a good account of themselves against Championship leaders Leeds United tomorrow night, kick-off 5:45pm.

arts.ttl: Derby County v Leeds United injury latest as trio ruled out amid double doubt
arts.sum: Derby will hope for a much-improved performance against a Leeds team who look a good bet to secure a return to the Premier League thanks to an embarrassment of riches in attack. Derby do have some injury problems to contend with for the visit of Farke's men and here's the latest from the treatment table ahead of the game tomorrow night.

arts.ttl: Leeds condemn fans' anti-Palestine chant as Manor Solomon song goes viral
arts.sum: Leeds fans have been told by their club that chant about on loan Israel winger Manor Solomon "hating Palestine" is not acceptable after clip of song went viral

arts.ttl: TalkSport pundit gives Derby County Leeds United ammunition after 'poor' remark
arts.sum: TalkSport pundit Gabby Agbonlahor may have done Derby County's team talk after his prediction for their clash against Leeds United tomorrow night (5.45pm). Leeds proved too strong for Derby at Elland Road earlier in the month as they secured a 2-0 victory as they registered another home win.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke discusses Leeds United transfer plans
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke is not yet assessing what his squad requires in the January window, but he has his eye on the date when he is going to start seriously considering it. Leeds have one more game before the January window officially opens, and that is what is taking up all of Daniel Farke’s focus at this stage.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI for Derby with Tanaka and Gnonto set for recalls
arts.sum: "I am respectful because I rate Paul Warne as a coach," said United manager Daniel Farke. Farke is blessed to have goals throughout his team and suggested there will be changes to his starting XI in the wake of their 2-0 win at Stoke City.
